LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANDREW ROTH'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SUPERIOR COURT TO COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES, SUPERIOR COURT FOR THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES AND THE ENDS OF JUSTICE WOULD BE PROMOTED BY THE CHANGE. CCP SECTION 397(C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Continued To May-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Joinder In The Mtn To Change Venue Filed By Andrew Roth M.D.
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT UNUM GROUP, UNUMPROVIDENT CORPORATION, and, UNUM LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA'S Joinder in the Motion to Change Venue Filed By Andrew Roth M.D. Appearances: Sheena Jain, Esq., of Wilson Elser, (415) 433-0990, appearing for the Unum Defendants, and joins motion. David J. Ozeran, Esq. of LaFollette, Johnson, DeHaas, Fesler & Ames (213) 426-3600, (Appearing thru CourtCall) appearing for Defendant Andrew Roth, M.D., and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Request for judicial notice is granted. Motion to change venue to Los Angeles County is granted. The Court finds that the convenience of witnesses and the ends of justice would be promoted by the change. CCP section 397(c). Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANDREW ROTH'S Motion to Change Venue from San Francisco County, Superior Court to County of Los Angeles, Superior Court for the State of California. Appearances: Sheena Jain, Esq., of Wilson Elser, (415) 433-0990, appearing for the Unum Defendants, and joins motion. David J. Ozeran, Esq. of LaFollette, Johnson, DeHaas, Fesler & Ames (213) 426-3600, (Appearing thru CourtCall) appearing for Defendant Andrew Roth, M.D., and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Request for judicial notice is granted. Motion to change venue to Los Angeles County is granted. The Court finds that the convenience of witnesses and the ends of justice would be promoted by the change. CCP section 397(c). Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Karen w. Yiu, Esq. Deputy Attorney General, State of California, appearing for Defendant, Commissioner of the California Department of Insurance. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained. Thirty days leave to amend. The Commissioner shall have 30 days thereafter to file a responsive pleading. Order signed in Open Court (302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANDREW ROTH'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Appearances: David J. Ozeran, Esq. of LaFollette Johnson (213) 426-3600, appearing for Defendant Andrew Roth; (counsel did not comply with tentative ruling rule re: intention to appear and argue. No other appearances.
Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ANDREW ROTH'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO 4TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION.
(302/PHA/VC) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANDREW ROTH'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: David J. Ozeran, Esq. of LaFollette Johnson (213) 426-3600, appearing for Defendant Andrew Roth; (counsel did not comply with tentative ruling rule re: intention to appear and argue. No other appearances.
